issues.title: Player defeated on floor 2 (early game)
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 2 out of the early floors (1-3). This may indicate the early game is too punishing for beginner profile players. Overall accuracy was 56%.

issues.title: Zero damage dealt in floor 2 encounter 2 (ember_drake)
issues.description: The player dealt 0 damage during floor 2, encounter 2 against ember_drake. The player had no way to damage the enemy, resulting in a dead end. Player was defeated.

issues.title: HP swung from 80 (100%) to 4 (5%) in floor 1 enc 0
issues.description: During floor 1, encounter 0, the player's HP ranged from 80 to 4. Starting above 70% (56 HP) and dropping below 20% (16 HP) within a single encounter is a frustrating experience.

issues.title: Card type "wild" was never played during the entire run
issues.description: The card type "wild" had 0 plays across the entire run (77 total cards played). This suggests either the card type was not available in the deck or was not worth playing.
